description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-wing layout with a combination of flat and gabled roofs, giving it a modern yet traditional appearance. The exterior is primarily finished in light-colored materials with contrasting dark roofing, and large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front includes a circular driveway leading to a prominent entryway, flanked by steps and a covered porch area. Multiple sections of the house are visible, including what appears to be a garage wing and several distinct living areas. The rear and side elevations reveal additional windows and access points, as well as a paved area adjacent to the garage. The overall design suggests a spacious, upscale suburban residence with a focus on both functionality and curb appeal.
description: A large, multi-wing house with light walls, dark roofs, and numerous large windows, featuring a circular driveway and prominent entryway. The design blends modern and traditional elements for a spacious, upscale appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, circular driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement with a clear view of the garage wing.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the garage section, paved driveway, and the connection between the main house and garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, back entrances, and the overall depth of the house layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear and side elevations, with more windows and the transition between different roof heights.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with steps, covered porch, and prominent double doors
